open_clippy_prs.title: [Clippy] feat: add RegisterCustomHandler extensibility API to DocumentAssembler
[Clippy] feat(excel): add ExcelAssembler for template-based xlsx document assembly
[Clippy] fix(word): add Optional attribute support to DocumentAssembler Conditional directive
[Clippy] fix(pptx): handle ExtendedPart chart workbooks in CopyChartObjects and CopyExtendedChartObjects
[Clippy] feat(word): add HeaderRowCount attribute to DocumentAssembler Table directive
[Clippy] feat(word): add German and Spanish list-item text getters
